# FirePhage

> FirePhage provides comprehensive edge security for WordPress and WooCommerce sites, including WAF, bot filtering, DDoS mitigation, CDN integration, and monitoring tools to protect against malicious traffic and attacks.

FirePhage delivers an advanced security platform designed to protect WordPress and WooCommerce environments from hostile traffic, attacks, and abuse. It offers edge protection through DNS onboarding, real-time monitoring, attack mitigation, and a human-readable dashboard, facilitating easy management and visibility into security events. The system is suitable for high-traffic sites, agencies, and stores needing scalable, lightweight protection that minimizes operational noise.

## Core Content
- [Edge protection overview](https://firephage.com) Explains how FirePhage's edge security model mitigates malicious traffic early.
- [WordPress WAF](https://firephage.com/services/waf) Details on the web application firewall rules designed for WordPress sites.
- [WooCommerce protection](https://firephage.com/services/bot-protection) Focuses on safeguarding checkout, cart, and API workflows against fake orders, scraping, and login abuse.
- [Bot and DDoS mitigation](https://firephage.com/services/ddos-protection) Describes how the platform blocks automated and malicious requests in real-time.
- [Edge firewall rules](https://firephage.com/services/waf) A detailed description of the firewall policies tailored for WordPress security.
- [Uptime monitoring](https://firephage.com/services/uptime-monitor) Information on continuous website availability checks and alerts.
- [Attack mitigation metrics](https://firephage.com) Highlights the platform's filtering effectiveness (>99.9%), latency (<50ms), and uptime (0 downtime).

## Features & Workflows
- Summary of DNS onboarding, staged cutovers, and zero-downtime deployment procedures.
- How "Under Attack Mode" escalates protection instantly during traffic spikes.
- Overview of human-readable security dashboards, attack analytics, and WordPress plugin health insights.
- Step-by-step explanation of handling hostile traffic, bot pressure, and fake orders.
- Custom protection plans tailored for large-scale high-traffic sites and agencies.

## Pricing & Plans
- [Single site protection](https://firephage.com/register): $29/month with a 30-day free trial, requests up to 10M/month, includes firewall, DDoS, CDN, analytics, and email alerts.
- [Growth plan](https://firephage.com/register): $79/month for up to 3 sites, 24M requests/month, added performance insights.
- [Pro plan](https://firephage.com/register): $149/month accommodating up to 7 sites, 56M requests/month, priority support.
- Custom enterprise plans with tailored features and volume requests.

## Resources
- [Start free trial](https://firephage.com/register) for full protection.
- [Live demo](https://demo.firephage.com/app) to see the platform in action.
- [Contact sales](https://firephage.com/contact) for custom solutions.
- [Additional service pages](https://firephage.com/services/waf), [bot protection](https://firephage.com/services/bot-protection), [cdn](https://firephage.com/services/cdn), [uptime monitor](https://firephage.com/services/uptime-monitor), [attack mitigation](https://firephage.com/services/ddos-protection).
